topic: A student discovers their teacher follows them on social media
raw_output:
[story 1]

Elara scrolled through her phone, a wide, unguarded smile stretching across her face. She’d just seen Professor Albright’s latest post—a picture of a rare orchid she’d mentioned in class last week, captioned with a thoughtful reflection on botanical beauty. Her heart gave a little flutter, a warm, buoyant feeling bubbling up in her chest. She tapped the screen, a soft, pleased sigh escaping her lips. It was such a nice surprise, seeing a piece of the professor’s world bleed into hers, even in this digital space. She felt a lightness, as if a small, bright sun had just broken through the clouds.

[story 2]

Liam leaned back in his chair, a genuine, expansive grin spreading across his features. He had just clicked on the teacher’s profile and found a recent photo from a weekend hike—a stunning vista bathed in golden light. A wave of pure delight washed over him, making him lean forward slightly, his eyes sparkling. "Wow," he murmured to himself, a soft, appreciative sound. It was wonderful how connected they seemed, this shared space online. He felt an energetic lift in his spirit, a sense of pleasant surprise washing over him like warm honey.

[story 3]

Maya sat at her desk, tapping her chin thoughtfully before looking up at her screen. There, Professor Davies had shared a short video clip of a student project presentation, highlighting a particularly clever piece of student work. Maya couldn't help but laugh—a clear, unrestrained sound that made her shoulders shake slightly. A radiant warmth flooded her cheeks. It was exhilarating, this unexpected glimpse into the professor's personal feed. She felt an incredible sense of ease, a buoyant feeling settling deep in her core, making her want to stretch and breathe deeply.
